title: Internal Error: V3Delayed.cpp:562: <= on read+write method

features.name: queue pop_front in non-blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment where the right-hand side calls a queue method that reads and modifies the queue

features.name: queue method with side effect in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include an always block triggered by clock edge that assigns to a variable using a queue method which mutates the queue
